common.signupEmailNote: Please use this email address when you fill out the signup form - you can change it afterwards if you want, once your account is set up.

groupInvitation.loginPrompt: If you''d like to accept this invitation, please login to RSpace at {0}.

groupInvitationExistingUser.body: {0} ({1}) has invited you to join their RSpace group ''{2}''.
groupInvitationExistingUser.onceLoggedIn: Once you''ve logged in, there will be an invitation message waiting for you - accept this invitation and you will be added to {0}''s group.

groupInvitationNewUser.accept: If you''d like to accept this invitation, please sign up for an account.
groupInvitationNewUser.body: Welcome to RSpace! {0} ({1}) has invited you to join their RSpace group ''{2}''.
groupInvitationNewUser.help: There is lots of written and video help material on the RSpace help website, or you can use the in-app Need Help? button on the bottom-right of RSpace. You can also ask for help at support@researchspace.com.
groupInvitationNewUser.onceSignedUp: Once you''ve signed up, there will be an invitation message waiting for you - accept this invitation and you will be added to {0}''s group.

groupPiInvitationExistingUser.body: {0} ({1}) has invited you to create an RSpace group ''{2}'', with you as its Principal Investigator.
groupPiInvitationExistingUser.onceLoggedIn: Once you''ve logged in, there will be an invitation message waiting for you - accept this invitation and your group will be created, with {0} as your Lab Admin.

groupPiInvitationNewUser.accept: To accept this request, all you have to do is go to {0}, where you can sign up for an account and authorize the creation of the group.
groupPiInvitationNewUser.body: Welcome to RSpace! {0} ({1}) wants to create an RSpace group ''{2}'', with you as its Principal Investigator.
groupPiInvitationNewUser.onceSignedUp: Once you''ve signed up, there will be an invitation message waiting for you - accept this invitation and your group will be created, with {0} as your Lab Admin.

shareRecordInvitationExistingUser.body: {0} ({1}) wants to share a document ({2}) with you.
shareRecordInvitationExistingUser.loginPrompt: If you''d like to accept this request, please login to RSpace at {0}.
shareRecordInvitationExistingUser.onceLoggedIn: Once you''ve logged in, there will be a request waiting for you - accept this request and the document ({0}) will be shared.

shareRecordInvitationNewUser.accept: If you''d like to accept this request, please sign up for an account.
shareRecordInvitationNewUser.body: Welcome to RSpace! {0} ({1}) has invited you to view a document ''{2}''.
shareRecordInvitationNewUser.onceSignedUp: Once you''ve signed up, there will be a request waiting for you - accept this request and the document ({0}) will be shared.

signupVerification.activate: If it was really you that signed up, please use the link below to verify and activate your account.
signupVerification.signedUp: You, or someone else, have signed up for an RSpace account, at:
signupVerification.subject: Welcome to RSpace
